title: Control Structures, Functions & Tooling
builds_on: P1 - syntax, variables, types, operators, output
scope: Conditionals, loops, functions, recursion, lambdas, decorators, generators, modules, pip, venv, Poetry, Pytest.

assessments.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
assessments.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
